text:
From: Interbulk Shipbrokers New Delhi -India <chartering@interbulkshipping.in> 
Sent: 14 November 2025 15:45
To: Interbulk Shipbrokers New Delhi -India <chartering@interbulkshipping.in>
Subject: // A/C SAIL / 75,000 MT (+)10/ (-)5% OO COKING COAL IN BULK/ EX USA TO ECI //
 
DATE :14TH NOV 2025
 
REF :IBC/RT/005
 
HAVE FOLL TO FIX:
 
ACCT SAIL

CARGO AND QUANTITY: 75,000 MT (+)10/ (-)5% OO COKING COAL IN BULK
 
LAYDAYS : 22-31 DEC 2025
 
 
LOADPORT: 1/2 SB 1 SP PIER IX, NEWPORT NEWS, VIRGINIA, USA
 
LOADRATE: 40,000 MT PWWD SASHEX UU OTHERWISE AS PER CP FORMAT. 
DISCHARGEPORT: 1/ 2 SB / SA EACH 1/ 2 SP OUT OF VIZAG / GANGAVARAM / PARADIP / DHAMRA /GOPALPUR/ SANDHEADS OR SAGAR - HALDIA, SYAMA PRASAD MOOKERJEE (SMP) /HALDIA SMP. SAGAR - HALDIA / HALDIA, IF USED, WILL ALWAYS BE 2ND DISCHARGE PORT. 
DISCHARGE RATE: 
VIZAG: 20,000 MT PWWD SASHEX UU 
PARADIP: 10,000 MT PWWD SASHEX UU
GANGAVARAM (GPL): 40,000 MT SHINC 
DHAMRA: 35000 MT SHINC
GOPALPUR: 15000 MT SHINC 
SANDHEADS / SAGAR : 10000 MT SHINC 
HALDIA: 12,000 MT PWWD SASHEX UU
(NOTE: UU/SHINC PROVISION TO BE APPLICABLE AFTER COMMENCEMENT OF LAYTIME). 
 
DEMURRAGE/DESPATCH: THE CEILING DEMURRAGE RATE FOR THIS ENQUIRY SHALL BE USD 23850 PER DAY / HD BENDS. HOWEVER, BIDDERS CAN QUOTE BELOW THE CEILING RATE..
 
FREIGHT: THE FREIGHT RATE TO BE QUOTED BASIS ONE LOAD PORT /ONE DISCHARGE PORT (VIZAG PORT) I.E. (1/1) BASIS WITH LOADRATE OF 40000 METRIC TONS/DISCHARGE RATE OF 20000 METRIC TONS.
 
2.50 ADCOM PLUS 1.25% TO INTERBULK
 
REPLY BY 1200 HOURS IST TUESDAY  I.E 18TH NOVEMBER  2025
 
+ + + +
 
BEST REGARDS
 
ASHISH DHALL             MOB.: +91-9958349991
RAJNEESH SHARMA          MOB.: +91-9958349990
 
INTERBULK SHIPBROKERS
NEW DELHI, INDIA
 
EMAIL: CHARTERING@INTERBULKSHIPPING.IN

LOAD_PORT: PIER IX, NEWPORT NEWS, VIRGINIA, USA
RESTRICTIONS: CEILING DEMURRAGE RATE: USD 23850 PER DAY

discharge_port: Vizag / Gangavaram / Paradip / Dhamra / Gopalpur / Sandheads / Sagar - Haldia
